mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.rule_sets_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, name, description, target_module, default_effect, active, state_id, flow_id, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT p.id, p.tenant, NOW(), p.name, p.description, p.target_module, p.default_effect, p.active, p.state_id, p.flow_id, p.created_time, p.last_modified_time FROM hm_rules.policy p

INSERT INTO hm_query.rules_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, name, expression, effect, priority, policy_id, policy_name ) SELECT r.id, r.tenant, NOW(), r.name, r.expression, r.effect, r.priority, r.policy_id, p.name FROM hm_rules.policy_rule r JOIN hm_rules.policy p ON r.policy_id = p.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.decisions_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, policy_id, subject_id, effect, reasons, target_module, created_time ) SELECT d.id, d.tenant, NOW(), d.policy_id, d.subject_id, d.effect, d.reasons, d.target_module, d.created_time FROM hm_rules.decisions d

INSERT INTO hm_query.fact_definitions_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, name, description, data_type, module, created_time ) SELECT fd.id, fd.tenant, NOW(), fd.name, fd.description, fd.data_type, fd.module, fd.created_time FROM hm_rules.fact_definition fd
